mapper.select:
SELECT a.id AS one_id,
a.tag_name_en AS one_tag_name, c.tag_name_en AS three_tag_name,
a.tag_name AS one_tag_name, c.tag_name AS three_tag_name,
c.id AS three_id, COUNT(CASE WHEN d.function_list != 4 THEN c.id END) AS count FROM vehicle_function_one_tag a LEFT JOIN vehicle_function_two_tag b ON a.id = b.function_one_tag_id LEFT JOIN vehicle_function_three_tag c ON b.id = c.function_two_tag_id LEFT JOIN vehicle_function_tree d ON d.function_three_tag_id = c.id LEFT JOIN vehicle_base_info e on e.id = d.vehicle_id where e.status = 1
and e.id in
#{i}
GROUP BY c.id, c.tag_name, a.id, a.tag_name
having one_id IN
#{id}

SELECT
CONCAT(g.brand_en,"-",h.vehicle_model) brand_model, a.tag_name_en one_tag_name,
CONCAT(g.brand,"-",h.vehicle_model) brand_model, a.tag_name one_tag_name,
d.vehicle_id, a.id one_id, count(CASE WHEN d.function_list != 4 THEN d.function_three_tag_id END ) as count, f.three_count FROM vehicle_function_one_tag a left join (SELECT a.id one_id, COUNT(c.id) three_count FROM vehicle_function_one_tag a LEFT JOIN vehicle_function_two_tag b ON a.id = b.function_one_tag_id LEFT JOIN vehicle_function_three_tag c ON b.id = c.function_two_tag_id group by a.id) f on f.one_id = a.id
LEFT JOIN vehicle_function_two_tag b ON a.id = b.function_one_tag_id LEFT JOIN vehicle_function_three_tag c ON b.id = c.function_two_tag_id LEFT JOIN vehicle_function_tree d ON d.function_three_tag_id = c.id left JOIN vehicle_base_info h on h.id = d.vehicle_id left join vehicle_brand g on h.brand_id = g.id where a.status = 1
and h.id in
#{i}
GROUP BY d.vehicle_id,a.id,f.three_count,
g.brand_en,
g.brand,
h.vehicle_model
having vehicle_id in
#{id}

SELECT
a.tag_name_en one_tag_name, b.tag_name_en two_tag_name, c.tag_name_en three_tag_name, CONCAT(g.brand_en,"-",h.vehicle_model) vehicle_name,
a.tag_name one_tag_name, b.tag_name two_tag_name, c.tag_name three_tag_name, CONCAT(g.brand,"-",h.vehicle_model) vehicle_name,
a.id one_tag_id, d.function_list, b.id two_tag_id, c.id three_tag_id, h.id vehicle_id FROM vehicle_function_one_tag a LEFT JOIN vehicle_function_two_tag b ON a.id = b.function_one_tag_id LEFT JOIN vehicle_function_three_tag c ON b.id = c.function_two_tag_id LEFT JOIN vehicle_function_tree d ON d.function_three_tag_id = c.id left JOIN vehicle_base_info h on h.id = d.vehicle_id left join vehicle_brand g on h.brand_id = g.id where a.status = 1
and a.id in
#{id}
and d.vehicle_id in
#{id}

SELECT
b.description, a.function_label,
b.description_en description, a.function_label_en function_label,
a.video_number, a.picture_number, a.video_str srt_url FROM `vehicle_function_tree` a, vehicle_function_three_tag b where a.vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} and a.function_three_tag_id = #{threeTagId} and b.id = a.function_three_tag_id

SELECT
CONCAT(g.brand,"-",h.vehicle_model) brand_model, a.tag_name function_name,
CONCAT(g.brand_en,"-",h.vehicle_model) brand_model, a.tag_name_en function_name,
d.vehicle_id, a.id one_id, count(CASE WHEN d.function_list != 4 THEN d.function_three_tag_id END ) as count, f.three_count FROM vehicle_function_one_tag a left join (SELECT a.id one_id, COUNT(c.id) three_count FROM vehicle_function_one_tag a LEFT JOIN vehicle_function_two_tag b ON a.id = b.function_one_tag_id LEFT JOIN vehicle_function_three_tag c ON b.id = c.function_two_tag_id group by a.id) f on f.one_id = a.id
LEFT JOIN vehicle_function_two_tag b ON a.id = b.function_one_tag_id LEFT JOIN vehicle_function_three_tag c ON b.id = c.function_two_tag_id LEFT JOIN vehicle_function_tree d ON d.function_three_tag_id = c.id left JOIN vehicle_base_info h on h.id = d.vehicle_id left join vehicle_brand g on h.brand_id = g.id where a.status = 1 GROUP BY d.vehicle_id,a.id,f.three_count,
g.brand
g.brand_en
,h.vehicle_model HAVING vehicle_id in (#{id})

select
c.tag_name perception_ability_name , b.tag_name three_tag_name, CONCAT(f.brand,'-',e.vehicle_model) vehicle_name,
c.tag_name_en perception_ability_name , b.tag_name_en three_tag_name, CONCAT(f.brand_en,'-',e.vehicle_model) vehicle_name,
a.function_list is_have, a.vehicle_id FROM vehicle_function_tree a LEFT JOIN vehicle_function_three_tag b on a.function_three_tag_id = b.id LEFT JOIN vehicle_function_two_tag c on b.function_two_tag_id = c.id LEFT JOIN vehicle_function_one_tag d on c.function_one_tag_id = d.id left JOIN vehicle_base_info e on e.id = a.vehicle_id LEFT JOIN vehicle_brand f on e.brand_id = f.id where d.tag_name = "感知能力"
and vehicle_id in
#{id}
